query:
SELECT 
  c.id as campaign_id, 
  c.title, 
  c.mood_board_primary_image_url,
  COUNT(mb.id) as mood_board_image_count,
  COUNT(cs.id) as shot_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cs.status = 'complete' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as complete_shots,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cs.status = 'generating' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generating_shots,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cs.status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_shots
FROM campaigns c
LEFT JOIN campaign_mood_board_images mb ON mb.campaign_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN campaign_shots cs ON cs.campaign_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.title, c.mood_board_primary_image_url
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
